summary: W975 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W974 bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint and localized adjunction fields with the route-local W975 localized-adjunction data provider. The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract product-success evidence, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.

Prefer a real input reduction next, such as bundling the unit mapping-cone model/component/chosen-isomorphism fields without adding extra assumptions.
